name: hackernews
description: Hacker News stories via Algolia search API. Supports topic-specific queries.
best_for: Global tech news and developer discussions

config_params.queries: list[str] — search keywords. Default: ['AI OR LLM OR machine learning']. Set to topic-relevant terms for better results.

config_guidance: Set queries to topic-relevant English keywords for targeted results. E.g. for OCR: ['OCR', 'text recognition', 'document AI'].

name: github_trending
description: GitHub multi-strategy repo search. Supports dynamic queries and sort strategies.
best_for: Open-source project discovery, competitor/alternative analysis, tech trend tracking

config_params.queries: list[str] — search keywords derived from the report topic. Include synonyms, alternative names, AND competitor search terms (e.g. '<tool> alternative', '<category> framework vs'). REQUIRED.
config_params.strategies: list[str] — 'rising' (new + fast-growing, best for trends), 'created' (brand-new projects), 'updated' (actively maintained). Default: ['rising', 'created', 'updated'].
config_params.per_query: int — results per query per strategy. Default: 8.

config_guidance: Always set queries. Include both the main topic and comparison terms (e.g. for OCR: ['OCR', 'text recognition', 'OCR vs', 'OCR alternative', 'document AI']). The 'rising' strategy finds repos created in the last 90 days that are gaining stars fast — ideal for discovering breakout projects.

name: hf_papers
best_for: AI/ML research papers and state-of-the-art models

name: arxiv
description: arXiv academic papers (cs.CV, cs.LG, cs.AI, cs.CL)
best_for: Academic papers in AI, computer vision, NLP

name: 36kr
description: 36氪 — 中国最大的科技创业媒体。支持热门文章 + 关键词搜索 + RSS 三路抓取。
best_for: 中国科技行业新闻、大厂动态、AI/开源项目发布、创业融资。技术类报告必选。
priority_hint: tech 类报告中应优先选择此源，覆盖中国科技行业大事件（如大厂开源模型发布）

config_params.queries: list[str] — 搜索关键词，用于 36kr 搜索 API。可选，不设则只抓热门+RSS。

config_guidance: 技术类报告务必设置 queries 为主题中文关键词（如 ['OCR', '文字识别', '阿里 OCR']），以确保抓到相关行业新闻。

name: wallstreetcn
description: 华尔街见闻 — Chinese financial news and market flash
best_for: Real-time financial news, macro analysis, market events

name: weibo
description: 微博热搜 — Weibo hot search trending topics
best_for: Chinese social media trends and public sentiment

name: tencent
description: 腾讯新闻 — Tencent News aggregator
best_for: General Chinese news across all categories

name: v2ex
description: V2EX — Chinese developer community hot topics
best_for: Developer community discussions and tech opinions

name: cn_economy
description: 东方财富经济新闻 — Eastmoney economic news
best_for: Official Chinese economic news and policy updates

name: akshare_stock
description: AKShare A股/港股指数行情数据
best_for: Real-time A-share and HK stock index data

name: akshare_macro
description: AKShare 中国宏观经济指标 (PMI, CPI, etc.)
best_for: Chinese macroeconomic indicators and statistical data

name: duckduckgo
description: DuckDuckGo 搜索引擎。支持网页搜索和新闻搜索（新闻搜索自带日期字段）。免 API Key，可配代理。
best_for: 通用主题搜索、行业新闻发现、大厂动态追踪。技术类报告推荐使用 news 模式搜索中英文关键词。
priority_hint: 当需要覆盖最新行业新闻（如大厂开源发布、产品更新）时，必须选择此源

config_params.queries: list[str] — 搜索关键词列表。必填。中英文均可，建议覆盖核心主题及大厂名称。
config_params.max_results: int — 每个 query 最大结果数。默认 10。
config_params.region: str — 搜索区域，'cn-zh'（中文优先）或 'wt-wt'（全球）。默认 'wt-wt'。
config_params.use_news: bool — 是否使用新闻搜索（有日期字段）。默认 True。

config_guidance: queries 必须包含主题关键词的中英文版本和大厂名称。例如 OCR 周报: ['OCR 开源', '阿里 OCR', '文字识别 开源', 'OCR open source model']。region 设为 'cn-zh' 可优先获取中文结果。

name: baidu
description: 百度搜索引擎。免 API Key，国内直达，中文搜索质量高。
best_for: 中国国内新闻、大厂动态、政策解读、中文技术资讯。搜索结果无日期字段，建议配合其他有时间过滤的源使用。
priority_hint: 中文技术报告或国内行业分析时推荐使用

config_params.queries: list[str] — 搜索关键词列表。必填。建议使用中文关键词。
config_params.max_per_query: int — 每个 query 最大结果数。默认 10。

config_guidance: queries 应为中文关键词，覆盖主题核心词和相关大厂。例如: ['阿里 OCR 开源', '百度文字识别', 'OCR 技术 2026']。

name: rss
best_for: Custom RSS feeds from any source
